rationale: Heterogeneous bucket. Most common pattern `function(n,[s]){if(n.trim()=="")return[];try{...}}` destructures its 2nd arg — in our single-arg VM wrapper, destructuring undefined throws. Those 11 variants will remain js_exception. The 5 variants without the destructured parameter (trex `e.scripts`, deno `e.imports`) early-return `[]` on truthy-check or trim-empty-check when input is `""`. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `""` yields `[]`. Converts ~5/16 generators; remaining 11 are shape-too-loose w.r.t. our sandboxed single-arg calling convention.
